title: Resource
description: Represents a resource in the SAP Analytics Cloud file repository. Resources can be stories, models, folders, or other content types.

id.description: The unique identifier of the resource

name.description: The display name of the resource

description.description: A text description of the resource

resourceType.description: The type of resource (e.g., STORY, MODEL, FOLDER)

createdTime.description: The timestamp when the resource was created

modifiedTime.description: The timestamp when the resource was last modified

parentId.description: The ID of the parent folder
